steps.title: Trace the two-way influence
steps.content: The sentence says ocean waves force reinforcements or redesigns of marine structures, and those structural changes may then alter local wave patterns. The blank must name this reciprocal effect between structures and ocean forces.

steps.title: Reject one-sided meanings
steps.content: Choice B names strain or conflict, not mutual influence. Choice C means mismatch, and Choice D means a gradual scale or sequence. The word that captures back-and-forth influence between two forces is "interplay." The answer is A.
